extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POL Remco soloed to victory on Las Ubiñas, putting 52 seconds into ROGLIC and extending GC lead through pure seated power on 13% grades.
tactical_patterns: Van der Pol's seated climbing on 13% gradients revealed superior core strength differentiator over traditional explosive climbers like Roglic.
Early breakaway attempts instantly shut down despite categorized start suggests teams protecting GC energy rather than stage hunting.
Rodriguez outperformed Mas as Ineos GC option despite younger rider jersey being on loan, signaling leadership shift.

rider_signals.VAN DER POL Remco: positive: Only rider matching his strength in seated position on steep gradients, suggesting sustainable power advantage on extreme pitches.
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: negative: Lost 52 seconds despite starting day 1:01 down, struggling mid-climb more than finish indicates deeper form issues.
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Carlos: positive: Beat Mas head-to-head on steep finish, emerging as real Ineos GC leader despite being young rider.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: negative: Caught and passed by Ayuso on steepest sections, losing ground to younger Spanish GC rivals.
rider_signals.SIVAKOV Pavel: negative: Already 5:40 down after first week signals complete elimination from podium contention unusually early.
